description: Style NoteMake a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather handbag from hidekraft. With short handles and legs at the base, this bag makes for a fab combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsBrown textured handbag made of leatherHas two short handles so that you can sling it on your shoulders or hang it from your wristOne main zippered compartment with a zippered pocket and organiser sleevesOne zippered pocket at the backMetal feet on baseWarranty: 180 daysMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 28 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 13 cm
